mnemonics: Train, Validate, Don't Deviate - Remember the order: Train model, then Validate its performance on unseen data.
keyPoints: Training Set: Used to teach the model parameters.
Validation Set: Used to tune hyperparameters and prevent overfitting.
The validation set acts as a proxy for the test set during model development.
commonMistakes: Using the validation set to train the model, which leads to data leakage.
Not using a validation set at all, making hyperparameter tuning blind.
Making too many tuning decisions based on the validation set, which can overfit the validation data.
